title: dracaena terniflora var. thwaitesii
intro: Dracaena terniflora var. thwaitesii is an evergreen shrub or small tree in the family Asparagaceae, commonly known as the Ceylon sago or thwaites sago, native to Sri Lanka. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dracaena terniflora var. thwaitesii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making infusions, decoctions, or tinctures from its leaves or roots, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
